title: Get-started page renders login step with Google OAuth button
description: Verify the get-started page shows the login step with a Continue with Google button
steps: Navigate to /get-started
Wait for the page to fully load
Verify the page shows the login/sign-in step (step 1)
Look for a button containing the text 'Continue with Google'
Verify the Google button is visible and not disabled
Verify there is a Google 'G' icon/letter inside the button

title: Get-started page renders email/password sign-in form
description: Verify the login step shows email and password input fields along with the OAuth button
steps: Navigate to /get-started
Wait for the page to fully load
Verify an email input field is present (type='email' or placeholder containing 'email')
Verify a password input field is present (type='password')
Verify a submit button for email sign-in is present (text like 'Sign in' or 'Continue')
Verify the 'or' divider exists between the email form and the Google OAuth button

title: Google OAuth button initiates redirect on click
description: Verify clicking Continue with Google triggers a navigation away from the page
steps: Navigate to /get-started
Wait for the page to fully load
Find the 'Continue with Google' button
Click the 'Continue with Google' button
Wait briefly (2-3 seconds) for the redirect to initiate
Verify the page has navigated away from /get-started OR the button text changed to 'Redirecting...' OR the URL has changed to include 'accounts.google.com' or 'api/auth'

title: Sign-up mode toggle works and shows name field
description: Verify toggling between sign-in and sign-up modes works correctly
steps: Navigate to /get-started
Wait for the page to fully load
Look for a link or button to switch to sign-up mode (text like 'Sign up' or 'Create account' or 'Don't have an account')
Click the toggle to switch to sign-up mode
Verify a name input field appears (for new account creation)
Verify the email and password fields are still present
Verify the Google OAuth 'Continue with Google' button is still visible in sign-up mode

title: Email sign-in with valid test account proceeds to next step
description: Verify signing in with a valid test account moves to the connect step
steps: Navigate to /get-started
Wait for the page to fully load
Enter 'test@test.com' in the email input field
Enter 'test1234' in the password input field
Click the sign-in submit button
Wait for the authentication to complete (up to 5 seconds)
Verify the page has moved to step 2 (connect integrations) - look for text like 'Connect' or 'Google Calendar' or 'Todoist' provider options

title: Connect step shows Google Calendar and Todoist OAuth providers
description: After login, verify the connect step displays both OAuth integration providers
steps: Navigate to /get-started
Wait for the page to fully load
Sign in with email 'test@test.com' and password 'test1234'
Wait for authentication to complete and the connect step to appear
Verify 'Google Calendar' provider option is visible with a connect button
Verify 'Todoist' provider option is visible with a connect button
Verify there is a 'Skip' or 'Next' button to bypass the connect step

title: Google Calendar connect button initiates OAuth redirect
description: Verify clicking the Google Calendar connect button triggers an OAuth redirect
steps: Navigate to /get-started
Wait for the page to fully load
Sign in with email 'test@test.com' and password 'test1234'
Wait for the connect step to appear
Find the Google Calendar connect button
Click the Google Calendar connect button
Wait briefly (2-3 seconds)
Verify the page has navigated away OR the URL changed to include 'accounts.google.com' or 'api/auth'

title: Todoist connect button initiates OAuth redirect
description: Verify clicking the Todoist connect button triggers an OAuth redirect
steps: Navigate to /get-started
Wait for the page to fully load
Sign in with email 'test@test.com' and password 'test1234'
Wait for the connect step to appear
Find the Todoist connect button
Click the Todoist connect button
Wait briefly (2-3 seconds)
Verify the page has navigated away OR the URL changed to include 'todoist.com' or 'api/auth'
